scripts.fix: ruff format backend && ruff check backend --fix && cd frontend && pnpm run format
scripts.lint: ruff check backend && cd frontend && pnpm run lint
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run setup:backend && pnpm run setup:frontend && pnpm run setup:simulator
scripts.test: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:simulator
scripts.test:frontend: cd frontend && pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.typecheck: mypy backend && cd frontend && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
